items.prompt: Which pair correctly matches type to typical format?
choices: Unstructured → SQL tables; Semi-structured → fixed spreadsheets only
items.explain: Table 1.2 in the chapter: structured uses fixed schemas (CSV, SQL); semi-structured uses flexible tags (JSON, XML).

items.prompt: Unstructured data always fits a fixed row-and-column schema.
items.explain: Unstructured data (text, images, audio) does not follow a predefined tabular model.

items.prompt: A continuously updating clickstream is best described as:
items.explain: Dynamic datasets update continuously; static datasets are snapshots that change rarely.

items.prompt: Why might NLP be needed for a social-media feedback dataset?
items.rubric: Unstructured text lacks a fixed schema; slang/emojis require extraction/classification rather than simple SQL filters.
items.sample_answer: Posts are unstructured text; extracting sentiment or aspects needs NLP, not a simple tabular filter.
